name: Temporal Source Grounding
description: Find when a specific instrument or vocal first appears or finally disappears.

name: Local Transition Recognition
description: Select which musical change occurs at a given timestamp.

name: Transition-Aware Description
description: Generate a free-form description of the transition around a timestamp.

name: Global Temporal Ordering
description: Determine the chronological order of multiple transition descriptions.

name: Mood Trajectory Reasoning
description: Localize the highest or lowest emotional intensity intervals in the track.
